items.title: Builds on matrix addition and shapes
items.description: Matrix multiplication assumes you already understand matrix dimensions, transposes and how linear maps are stored as rectangular arrays.

items.title: Dot products inside each entry
items.description: Each entry of AB is a dot product between a row of A and a column of B, connecting matrix products to inner products on vectors.

items.title: Weight matrices in neural networks
items.description: Forward passes in fully connected layers are sequences of matrix multiplications (activations times weights), so fluency here transfers directly to deep learning.

items.title: Distance and geometry after composition
items.description: After linear maps reshape space, norms and distances measure how much vectors stretch or separate—useful when analyzing embeddings and losses.
